summary: Document Stamping Bug Fixes - All 3 critical bugs verified as FIXED. Backend stamp generation for all shapes (Rectangle with 5 layouts, Circle, Oval) working correctly. Frontend input responsiveness improved, sticky header functional.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Document Stamping bug fixes verified. All 3 bugs (stamp mismatch for rectangle shapes, input lag, sticky header) are confirmed fixed. Backend generate_branded_stamp_image function works correctly for all shapes. Frontend DocumentStampPage.jsx using local state for input responsiveness. Full stamping flow tested end-to-end with PDF upload, form fill, and successful stamp generation showing 'Document Secured!' modal with verification details.

stamp_mismatch_bug.description: Rectangle shape infinite recursion in generate_branded_stamp_image
stamp_mismatch_bug.test_verification: All 5 rectangle layouts (horizontal, vertical, compact, logo_left, logo_right) generate successfully

input_lag_bug.description: Text inputs slow due to unnecessary state syncing
input_lag_bug.test_verification: Description and recipient inputs respond immediately, values correctly captured

sticky_header.description: Stamp shape selector and progress bar sticky positioning
sticky_header.test_verification: Shape selector visible after scrolling, maintains sticky position
